Intercal

Jami: Just Another Machine Interface

Provider-agnosticInterchangeable partsAlways-on agentOpen source

The workspace where
agents and
humans share
the same interface.

Jami is an open source framework for customizable workspaces — mail, calendars, analytics, design, planning, research and beyond. Define an operation once and every interface gets it: buttons for humans, tools for the always-on agent, voice, and automations. Every part interchangeable — your models, your data, your hosting, your look.

View on GitHubOpen Intercal →
One action surface
Every button, tool call, and voice command runs the same code. Always.
Interchangeable parts
Swap any layer — model, database, search, or storage — without rebuilding.
An agent that keeps up
Always on, fully interruptible. Steer it, stop it, or take over any time.

Provider-agnostic by design

Bring your
providers.
Swap anything.

Every layer is replaceable. Model, database, search, storage, analytics, and deployment: teams evolve their stack without touching application logic. No lock-in at any tier.

Models

OpenAIAnthropicGeminiLocal

Databases

PostgresNeonSQLitePlanetScale

Search

TypesenseMeilisearchAlgoliaElastic

Storage / CDN

CloudflareVercelS3R2

Analytics

PostHogSentryMixpanelCustom

Deployment

VercelFlyRailwaySelf-hosted

Run locally. Deploy anywhere. Evolve from one harness to a full workspace suite.

View on GitHub

Talk to Jami.
Agents handle
the rest.

Jami is the real-time voice interface to your workspace. Voice, chat, user interface, and automation all route into the same underlying action system.

For flow

Voice

Talk to Jami while agents work in the background. Interrupt, approve, and redirect using natural speech, with no context switching or waiting.

intercal.jami.studio

“Voice-first when you want flow; full UI when you need precision.”

Explore Intercal →

Registry & suites

One app,
one harness,
or an intentional
suite.

Start with a single installable harness and grow into a coordinated workspace of specialist apps that all share the same action surface and SQL state.

Business

MailCalendarFormsAnalyticsContentOrchestration

Design

DesignAssetsSlidesClipsVisual Planning

Research

KnowledgeSourcesReportsContent DBData Connectors

Coding

Visual PlansPR RecapsCode AgentsBrowser DebugHarness

Harnesses

  1. 01

    Coding agents

    Safe operating environment for coding agents.

  2. 02

    Browser sessions

    Visual browsing and scraping harnesses.

  3. 03

    Visual planning

    Spatial canvas harness for planning agents.

  4. 04

    PR recaps

    Automated pull-request summarisation.

  5. 05

    MCP / A2A bridge

    Protocol bridge for external agent access.

One inbox.
One vault.
Everything shared.

Central orchestration

The orchestration app connects the workspace. It manages shared resources, including vaults, inboxes, approvals, routing, and cross-app delegation, so every specialist app stays focused on its own domain instead of rebuilding the same shared plumbing.

Shared Inbox

One inbox for messages, notifications, approvals.

Vault

Encrypted shared credentials for every app in the suite.

Approvals

Human-in-the-loop flows for sensitive agent operations.

Routing

Cross-app delegation so specialist apps stay focused.

Delegation

Tasks and context forwarded without leaving the workspace.

Audit log

Every action recorded. Agent and human alike.

Agent & UI parity

  1. 01

    Button / Form

    Human clicks. Action fires.

  2. 02

    Agent tool call

    Agent invokes. Same handler.

  3. 03

    Voice command

    Jami speaks the intent.

  4. 04

    MCP / A2A

    External agents reach in.

  5. 05

    Automation / CLI

    Scheduled tasks, scripts.

Every button
can be a tool.
Every tool
can have a UI.

Define an operation once. It becomes reachable by a human, an agent, a voice command, or a cron job, and always lands in the same durable SQL state.

“Agents and interfaces see the same world.”

All state lives in SQL. Agent writes surface in the UI. User actions update agent context. No sync layer. No drift.

Jami Studio

Build the next
generation of
agent software.

For solo developers, technical founders, and small teams building agent-enabled internal tools, workflow systems, and product surfaces.

View on GitHubFollow on XLinkedIn

Supporting ecosystem

Intercal: knowledge delta
for current context.

Intercal supplements model training gaps with discovery and current context. It extends the Jami ecosystem without introducing technical dependencies to the core framework.

Visit Intercal
Jami Studio

Adaptable agent frameworks for real workspaces. Agents and interfaces sharing the same actions, state, and context.
